data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for verification status at the request-item level.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the presence of verification rows with specific metadata, which is not evidenced in the prior steps. While there are multiple passed steps related to bookings and compliance, none of them provide evidence of the required verification rows or the associated metadata. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence provided for the requirement, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of verification rows with verifier biz/provider metadata.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
